search.query: index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | dedup analyst | sort analyst | table analyst
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit | dedup detection_rule | sort detection_rule | table detection_rule

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | stats sum(added_row_count) as r_added sum(removed_row_count) as r_removed sum(edited_row_count) as r_edited sum(auto_removed_count) as r_auto sum(eval(if(action="revert",1,0))) as r_revert sum(eval(if(action="column_removed" OR action="column_added",column_count,0))) as r_cols sum(eval(if(action="row_reordered" OR action="column_reordered",1,0))) as r_reorder sum(eval(if(action="column_renamed",1,0))) as r_rename | eval total_changes=coalesce(r_added,0)+coalesce(r_removed,0)+coalesce(r_edited,0)+coalesce(r_auto,0)+coalesce(r_revert,0)+coalesce(r_cols,0)+coalesce(r_reorder,0)+coalesce(r_rename,0) | table total_changes
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_added" | stats sum(added_row_count) as total_rows_added

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_removed" OR action="row_removed_multiple" OR action="auto_removed" | stats sum(removed_row_count) as total_rows_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_edited" | stats sum(edited_row_count) as total_rows_edited
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="row_reordered" | stats count as total_rows_reordered
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_added" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_added
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_removed" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_renamed" | stats sum(column_count) as total_columns_renamed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="column_reordered" | stats count as total_columns_reordered
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="revert" | stats count as total_reverts
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="audit_exported" | stats count as total_audit_exported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_exported" | stats count as total_csv_exported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_imported" | stats count as total_csv_imported
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_created" | stats count as total_csv_created
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="csv_removed" | stats count as total_csv_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="dr_created" | stats count as total_dr_created
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="dr_removed" | stats count as total_dr_removed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_submitted" | stats count as total_requests_submitted
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_approved" | stats count as total_requests_approved
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_rejected" | stats count as total_requests_rejected
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_failed" | stats count as total_requests_failed
index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where action="request_cancelled" | stats count as total_requests_cancelled

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where NOT match(action, "^request_|^audit_exported$|^csv_exported$|^csv_imported$|^csv_created$|^dr_created$|^dr_removed$|^csv_removed$|^trash_") | stats values(value{}) as value values(*) as * by action csv_file analyst timestamp | sort -timestamp | eval timestamp=if(match(timestamp, "^\d+\.?\d*$"), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z"), timestamp)
| eval action_label=case( action=="row_removed_multiple", "removed", action=="row_removed", "removed", action=="auto_removed", "auto removed", action=="row_edited", "edited", action=="row_added", "added", action=="revert", "reverted", action=="column_removed", "removed column", action=="column_added", "added column", action=="row_reordered", "reordered row", action=="column_reordered", "reordered column", action=="column_renamed", "renamed column" )
| eval row_change_count=case( action=="row_removed_multiple", removed_row_count, action=="row_removed", removed_row_count, action=="auto_removed", removed_row_count, action=="row_edited", edited_row_count, action=="row_added", added_row_count, action=="row_reordered", 1 )
| eval column_change_count=case( action=="column_removed", column_count, action=="column_added", column_count, action=="column_reordered", 1, action=="column_renamed", column_count )
| eval col_names=mvjoin('columns{}', ", ")
| eval summary=case( action_label="reverted", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".csv_file." ".reverted_from_version." ".row_count_before." row(s) version to ".reverted_to_version." ".row_count_after." row(s) version (which became the latest in the record ".new_record_version.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_removed", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".col_names." from ".csv_file." (".column_change_count." column(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_added", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".col_names." to ".csv_file." (".column_change_count." column(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="row_reordered", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." in ".csv_file." from position #".row_number_before." to #".row_number_after." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_reordered", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." '".column_name."' in ".csv_file." from position #".column_number_before." to #".column_number_after." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="column_renamed", "User ".analyst." ".action_label." '".column_renamed_before."' to '".column_renamed_after."' in ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, 1==1, "User ".analyst." ".action_label." ".row_change_count." row(s) from ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp ) | eval reason=coalesce(row_remove_reason, row_add_reason, revert_reason, row_edit_reason, column_remove_reason, comment, "") | table timestamp action analyst csv_file detection_rule reason row_change_count column_change_count request_id value summary

index=wl_audit sourcetype=wl_audit action=$action_filter$* analyst=$analyst_filter$ detection_rule=$rule_filter$ | where match(action, "^request_|^audit_exported$|^csv_exported$|^csv_imported$|^csv_created$|^dr_created$|^dr_removed$|^csv_removed$|^trash_") | eval csv_file=if(isnull(csv_file) OR csv_file="", "N/A", csv_file) | stats values(*) as * by action csv_file analyst timestamp | sort -timestamp | eval timestamp=if(match(timestamp, "^\d+\.?\d*$"), strftime(timestamp, "%d-%m-%Y %H:%M:%S GMT%:::z"), timestamp)
| eval action_label=case( action=="audit_exported", "exported audit", action=="csv_exported", "exported CSV", action=="csv_imported", "imported CSV", action=="csv_created", "created CSV", action=="dr_created", "created detection rule", action=="dr_removed", "removed rule", action=="csv_removed", "removed CSV", action=="request_submitted", "submitted request", action=="request_approved", "approved request", action=="request_rejected", "rejected request", action=="request_failed", "failed request", action=="request_cancelled", "cancelled request", action=="request_auto_cancelled", "auto-cancelled request", action=="trash_restored", "restored from trash", action=="trash_purged", "permanently purged", action=="trash_retention_changed","changed trash retention" )
| eval summary=case( action=="audit_exported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." exported ".export_file." audit file containing ".event_count." event(s) for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_exported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." exported ".export_file." containing ".row_count." row(s) for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_imported", "User ".analyst." ".if(status=="success","successfully","unsuccessfully")." ".import_mode." ".export_file." into ".csv_file." (".imported_row_count." row(s), detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="csv_created", "User ".analyst." created CSV ".csv_file." with ".column_count." column(s) for detection rule ".detection_rule." at ".timestamp, action=="dr_created", "User ".analyst." created new detection rule ".detection_rule." at ".timestamp, action=="dr_removed", "User ".analyst." ".case(removal_type=="trashed","moved to trash",removal_type=="permanent","permanently deleted",1==1,"unlinked")." rule ".detection_rule." (".csv_count." CSV file(s): ".csv_files.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="csv_removed", "User ".analyst." ".case(removal_type=="trashed","moved to trash",removal_type=="permanent","permanently deleted",1==1,"unlinked")." CSV ".csv_file." from rule ".detection_rule.if(rule_also_removed=="true"," (last CSV — rule also removed)","")." — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="request_submitted", "User ".analyst." submitted ".approval_action_type." request for ".csv_file." - ".description." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_approved", "User ".analyst." approved ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_rejected", "User ".analyst." rejected ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (reason: ".rejection_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_failed", "User ".analyst." failed to approve ".approval_action_type." request created by ".requester." for ".csv_file." (reason: ".failure_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_cancelled", "User ".analyst." cancelled their ".approval_action_type." request for ".csv_file." (reason: ".cancellation_reason.") (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") at ".timestamp, action=="request_auto_cancelled", "System auto-cancelled ".approval_action_type." request by ".analyst." for ".csv_file." (detection rule - ".detection_rule.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_restored", "User ".analyst." restored ".item_type." '".name."' from trash (originally deleted by ".original_deleted_by." on ".original_deleted_at.") — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_purged", "User ".analyst." permanently purged ".item_type." '".name."' from trash — ".comment." at ".timestamp, action=="trash_retention_changed", "User ".analyst." changed trash retention from ".old_retention_days." to ".new_retention_days." days — ".comment." at ".timestamp ) | eval reason=coalesce(row_remove_reason, row_add_reason, revert_reason, row_edit_reason, column_remove_reason, rejection_reason, failure_reason, cancellation_reason, comment, "") | table timestamp action analyst csv_file detection_rule reason request_id approval_action_type requester status export_file summary
| wlexpiringsoon | where "$rule_filter$"="*" OR detection_rule="$rule_filter$" | table detection_rule csv_file Expires value
